project.title: FileCabinet
project.description: Local-first Windows desktop vault for retaining, cataloging, previewing, verifying, and recovering high-signal technical artifacts.

produces: docs/FileCabinet v1.4.3 — Quality Gate and Installer Patch.md
consumes: User-selected files and folders for vault ingestion
Existing vault item files during rescan

datasets.name: FileCabinet catalog
datasets.description: Local JSON catalog containing vault metadata, artifact records, tags, categories, hashes, extracted text paths, thumbnail paths, activities, and UI preferences.

datasets.name: FileCabinet vault
datasets.description: Portable retained artifact storage containing items, thumbnails, extracted text, quarantine, and exports.

scripts.name: installer/build-installer.ps1
scripts.role: Publishes the self-contained Windows x64 build and creates the WiX MSI installer.

automation.deploy: Publish artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.4.3.0-win-x64.msi to the GitHub v1.4.3 release.
tasks: Build self-contained Windows x64 publish output
Include release notes from docs/FileCabinet v1.4.3 — Quality Gate and Installer Patch.md

notes.release_name: FileCabinet v1.4.3 — Quality Gate and Installer Patch
v1_4_3_highlights: SonarCloud coverage import now uses the VB.NET OpenCover report key so quality gate coverage is read correctly
CLI helper types live in a named namespace and parser branches have explicit defensive fallback handling
Regex release marker extraction uses a bounded timeout to avoid unbounded regular expression execution
Recoverable catalog, ingest, and headless rescan failures now record debug diagnostics instead of using empty catch blocks
Focused tests cover the new parser, CLI output, catalog recovery, rescan, and preview fallback paths
Application, CLI, installer default, and manifest version updated to 1.4.3
not_in_scope: Destructive cleanup of orphan generated assets
design_boundaries: Repairable local vault state over cloud dependency
notes.last_verified: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj passed 79 tests on 2026-06-01; installer/build-installer.ps1 -Version 1.4.3.0 completed on 2026-06-01
